channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Cohere's open-weight ASR model hits 5.4% word error rate — low enough to replace speech APIs in production pipelines
item.description: Enterprises building voice-enabled workflows have had limited options for production-grade transcription: closed APIs with data residency risks, or open models that trade accuracy for deployability. Cohere's new open-weight ASR model, Transcribe, is built to compete on all four key differentiators — contextual accuracy, latency, control and cost.Cohere says that Transcribe outperforms current leaders on accuracy — and unlike closed APIs, it can run on an organization's own infrastructure.Cohere, which can be accessed via an API or in Cohere’s Model Vault as cohere-transcribe-03-2026, has 2 bil...

item.title: iOS 27 : toutes les nouveautés attendues pour Siri sur vos iPhone
item.description: Voici un petit aperçu des avancées IA attendues du côté d'Apple avec la mise à jour iOS 27 pour les iPhone.

item.title: Le Vivo X300 Ultra est là, voici une grosse concurrence pour Samsung et Xiaomi
item.description: Regardez bien ce bloc optique massif. Vivo a présenté son nouveau X300 Ultra, son nouveau porte-étendard armé de deux capteurs de 200 Mpx.

item.title: Uber to acquire Berlin-based chauffeur hailing app to ramp up its luxury travel efforts
item.description: Uber has acquired Blacklane, a Berlin-based startup that offers chauffeur services and bookings through its app, with plans to expand further into the luxury travel industry. Blacklane, founded in 2011, acts as a liaison between independent local chauffeur services and travelers looking for a more premium ride. According to Uber, the deal is subject to regulatory approvals but is expected to close by the end of 2026. "This partnership marks a significant milestone in Blacklane’s next chapter and is a powerful step-change in introducing our service to new markets globally," Jens Wohltorf, found...

item.title: L’usure des batteries de voitures électriques s’accélère passé ce cap kilométrique précis
item.description: L'usure des batteries est la plus grande angoisse des acheteurs de voitures électriques d'occasion. Une vaste enquête indépendante menée sur des dizaines de milliers de véhicules vient de livrer son verdict. La dégradation est infime durant les premières années, mais un basculement très net s'opère une fois un cap kilométrique précis franchi.

item.title: What inventory signals about Florida’s housing market correction
item.description: The intensity of the housing downturn in Florida has eased somewhat in recent months. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: Test de la Razer Viper V4 Pro : Razer affine sa souris esport fétiche
item.description: Razer poursuit l’évolution de sa gamme esport avec la Viper V4 Pro, une nouvelle itération qui peaufine l’excellence technique sans bouleverser la formule d’origine.

item.title: Dyson’s thin PencilVac Fluffycones is tougher to resist at $150 off
item.description: Robot vacuums are great for keeping floors clean on a regular basis, but they don’t catch everything. If you’re looking for a tool to handle the finer details your robovac might miss — room corners, edges, hard stairs, entryways, etc. — Dyson’s PencilVac Fluffycones is one of the lightest, most versatile stick vacuums you can […]

item.title: Your Wimpy Workouts Aren’t Cutting It, Scientists Say
item.description: The more time you spend out of breath during the week, the better your health, new research suggests.

item.title: There's no point in upgrading to the Apple Watch Series 11 — save $300 on the Series 10 in Amazon's Spring Sale and get a near-identical wearable for a lot less
item.description: The Apple Watch Series 10 is just as good as the Series 11 — here's why you should save on the previous gen model instead.

item.title: We reviewed all the best budget TVs — this 'fantastic TV for the price' is the one you should buy today for big-screen thrills
item.description: Save over $1,000 on the launch price of the terrific TCL QM7K mini-LED

item.title: I found the best portable SSD deals for World Backup Day — store lots and save big
item.description: These are the best portable SSD deals we found for World Backup Day, with big savings on our favorite models.

item.title: Free joue avec nos nerfs avant l’annonce de demain
item.description: Free s’apprête à dévoiler sa « nouvelle révolution mobile » demain matin, mardi 31 mars 2026. L'entreprise joue avec nos nerfs une dernière fois en distillant quelques indices.

item.title: Another worrying macOS malware scheme has been discovered — here's how to stay safe
item.description: Malwarebytes discovers Infiniti Stealer - a new piece of malware targeting macOS devices.

item.title: Les prix des PS5 augmentent très bientôt : un bon plan d’acheter l’une des consoles de Sony dès maintenant ?
item.description: Les prix augmentent partout en ce moment... et ce n'est d'ailleurs pas la première hausse tarifaire pour la PS5. Mais là, ça pique vraiment : la version Standard va passer à 649 euros et la version Digitale à 599 euros. La PS5 Pro et le PS Portal sont également concernés. Il ne vous reste donc que quelques jours pour les obtenir à leurs « anciens » prix. ...

item.title: Pixel 11 : les premières fuites dévoilent un détail qui pourrait faire la différence
item.description: Le Pixel 11 devrait présenter un nouveau design avec un bloc photo modifié et des bordures d'écran plus fines. Les dimensions de l'appareil resteraient similaires, avec une légère réduction d'épaisseur. La sortie est attendue pour août 2026, mais le prix reste incertain, susceptible d'augmenter en raison de la hausse des coûts de production.

item.title: A new manufacturing process uses lasers to seal paper packaging instead of glue
item.description: Although paper is a more environmentally friendly packaging material than plastic, it's often contaminated with additives, such as adhesives used to create a secure seal. That complicates the recycling process and reduces the quality of recycled paper. Now, German researchers at four Fraunhofer institutes have developed an alternative process that can seal paper packaging without […]...

item.title: What is the release date for Invincible season 4 episode 5 on Prime Video?
item.description: The fifth chapter of Invincible's fourth season drops this week — here's when it'll come out on Prime Video.

item.title: Social media’s ‘Big Tobacco’ moment may have finally arrived
item.description: Landmark cases challenge long-held legal protections and push companies toward stricter safeguards for younger users. A pair of landmark court cases found Meta and YouTube guilty last week of harming young users by designing algorithms that were addictive and led to mental health distress. The damages assessed against the companies amounted to a fraction of a percent of their annual earnings. The long-term implications, however, could be far more significant....

item.title: Every phone ping takes 7 seconds of your attention — here’s how to get it back
item.description: Notifications steal seven seconds of your focus according to a new study, but there are ways to avoid this.

item.title: The latest Pixel 11 leak shows slimmer bezels and an all-black camera bar
item.description: The launch of the Google Pixel 11 is still months away, but leaked renders shared by Android Headlines may give us an idea of what to expect. Based on the images, the Pixel 11 could come with slimmer bezels than its predecessor, along with a completely black rear camera bar. The Pixel 10, which launched […]

item.title: The PS5 Pro shot up Amazon's best seller list after recent price hike announcement
item.description: The PS5 Pro is popular at Amazon right now with just days to go before a big price increase.

item.title: Amazon just launched the biggest Yeti sale I've seen — up to 30% off dozens of coolers, water bottles and travel mugs
item.description: A whole rainbow of Yeti products is included in the Spring Sale.

item.title: Keep your data safe and save big with these top NAS deals for World Backup Day 2026
item.description: World Backup Day: The best NAS deals to keep your personal data safe, organized and accessible.

item.title: Netflix is adding 3 unmissable thriller movies in April 2026 — and fans of creature features will be pleased
item.description: You'll be on the edge of your seat when these three gripping thriller movies arrive on Netflix in April.

item.title: Puces électroniques : cet industriel français confirme la pénurie d’hélium
item.description: Air Liquide a confirmé une pénurie mondiale d'hélium, un gaz crucial pour la fabrication de semi-conducteurs. Les prix de l'hélium montent en flèche et les acheteurs se bousculent, menaçant en bout de chaîne l'industrie des smartphones et des voitures.

item.title: Les 10 smartphones les plus populaires de la semaine sur Frandroid : un outisder en tête et un marché Android très hétéroclite
item.description: Pour notre top 10 des smartphones les plus populaires de la semaine sur Frandroid, c'est un constructeur inattendu qui prend la tête de notre classement. Dans le reste, tous les constructeurs Android ou presque réussissent à placer un modèle.

item.title: Microsoft's research assistant can now use multiple AI models simultaneously
item.description: Microsoft's Copilot is getting even better at research thanks to a new feature that combines the power of both OpenAI's ChatGPT and Anthropic's Claude. In a blog post announcing Copilot Cowork's availability, Microsoft debuted the Critique feature that will be used in Microsoft 356 Copilot's Researcher tool. Unlike the standard Copilot, Researcher is designed to tackle more complex tasks with multiple steps. Now, Researcher is getting even better at that with the Critique feature that uses GPT responses, which are then refined by Claude. In a blog post, Microsoft said that, "this architecture ...

item.title: 'This Internxt deal is as close as you'll get to free lifetime cloud storage': Our top cloud storage for security just cut the price by 90% when you use this link
item.description: Save 90% off lifetime cloud storage at Internxt.

item.title: I tested H2O Audio's affordable, no-frills, bone-conduction running headphones — and there's something to be said for simplicity
item.description: Affordable and no-fuss, but only worth it if you love the neckband style and bass isn’t your thing.

item.title: Nvidia pourrait enfin officialiser sa puce N1X pour PC portables au Computex 2026
item.description: Après plus d'une année de rumeurs, la puce N1X de Nvidia et MediaTek pourrait enfin être officialisée au Computex 2026. Encore quelques mois de patience.

item.title: Meilleurs mini-vidéoprojecteurs portables : notre sélection de picoprojecteurs en 2026
item.description: Envie de profiter d’un grand écran où que vous soyez sans vous encombrer ? Pour regarder un match ou un film en vacances, ou bien pour être transportés de pièce en pièce à la maison, nous avons sélectionné pour vous les meilleurs picoprojecteurs (ou mini-projecteurs) portables.

item.title: L’État liquide « 60 Millions de consommateurs » : le magazine a 3 mois pour trouver un repreneur
item.description: Le couperet est officiellement tombé ce dimanche 29 mars 2026 avec la publication d'un décret actant la dissolution de l'Institut national de la consommation. Le célèbre magazine dispose désormais de quelques semaines pour trouver un repreneur privé, sous peine de disparaître définitivement des kiosques.

item.title: Amazon is slashing its smart home gadgets for Spring Prime Day — 16 deals on Fire TV, Blink, Echo, Kindles, and more
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale features some strong deals on several of its best-selling devices, so I've hand-picked the top 16 offers on Kindles, Fire TV Sticks, Blink cameras, and more.

item.title: Students Are Now Renting Smart Glasses to Cheat on Exams
item.description: In China, there's a growing market for renting smart glasses to help you cheat on your tests.

item.title: Apple will hide your email address from apps and websites, but not cops
item.description: Demands for Apple customer records by federal agents in recent months underscore the privacy limitations of email.

item.title: I'm a gaming keyboard expert, and this analog model is one of my all-time favorites
item.description: Thankfully, the RAM crisis isn't inflating keyboard prices — so now's your chance to save big on the excellent SteelSeries Apex Pro.

item.title: Vous payez votre forfait mobile trop cher ? Cette offre 5G anti-inflation est la solution [Sponso]
item.description: Dans un climat économique incertain voire morose, toutes les éclaircies sont bonnes à prendre. Ce forfait sans engagement de Bouygues Telecom, qui offre 150 Go de données pour 11,99 € par mois, en est une.

item.title: New Details Add a Bizarre Twist to NASA’s First ISS Medical Evacuation
item.description: “It was completely out of the blue.”

item.title: Okta’s CEO is betting big on AI agent identity
item.description: Today, I’m talking with Todd McKinnon, who is co-founder and CEO of Okta, a platform that lets big companies manage security and identity across all the apps and services their employees use. Think of it like login management — actually, that’s a great way to think about it because the way most people encounter Okta […]

item.title: Major compromise of the telnyx PyPI library could put millions of users at risk
item.description: TeamPCP strikes again, with almost identical code to LiteLLM.

item.title: Du jamais vu sur Amazon : ce vidéoprojecteur Philips Full HD passe à -50%, de quoi se faire de bonnes soirées ciné sans se ruiner
item.description: Le Philips NeoPix 750 Smart est un vidéoprojecteur LED Full HD plutôt orienté entrée de gamme, avec une bonne luminosité et une interface Android bien pratique, vendu 174,90 euros au lieu de 349 euros.

item.title: Mullvad Browser's testers now get access to updates every four weeks, also on Linux ARM devices
item.description: Mullvad Browser’s testers get faster access to updates as the interface has just transitioned to the Firefox Rapid channel. Here's all you need to know.

item.title: Google Pixel 11 : voici son design qui change un peu, juste un peu
item.description: On connaît le design du Google Pixel 11 grâce à ces images. Voici les petits changements qui arrivent.

item.title: EV charging just got a massive boost for millions in the UK — as rule changes make it easier to avoid 'driveway discrimination’ at home
item.description: As of April 1, the UK government will introduce a raft of new grants and incentives, as well as the relaxing of planning permissions, to increase EV uptake

item.title: The best deals we’ve found from Amazon’s Big Spring Sale (so far)
item.description: Amazon loves to manufacture an event. March is historically a dry spell for deals; however, with Amazon’s third annual Big Spring Sale, which runs through tomorrow, March 31st, the retail behemoth is hoping to lure in would-be shoppers with the promise of steep(ish) savings and discounts on more seasonal, spring-centric items to hold folks over […]
